opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I saw bright red blood on the paper when I wiped, and there's a very itchy, uncomfortable lump right on the outside of my back passage. It came on a couple of days ago and it's really worrying me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Seeing the blood gave me a real fright and I want to know it's nothing serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two days ago, after a really hard, straining trip to the toilet
symptom_narrative.character: an itchy, uncomfortable lump on the outside, with bright red blood just on the toilet paper
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: not really painful, more uncomfortable and itchy — I can manage it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right on the outside of my back passage
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the blood shows up after I go to the toilet; the lump is there all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: hasn't really settled with anything yet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting for a long time makes it more uncomfortable
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel like I haven't fully emptied when I go, and it's itchy down there
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: first time anything like this has happened
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm avoiding sitting flat because it's uncomfortable

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I know my diet is pretty low in fibre, I don't eat many vegetables
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; feeling quite anxious since seeing the blood

objective_data_offered.value: a small lump about the size of a pea at the opening of the back passage, looks a bit purple/blue, soft and only a little sore to touch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/self-observed description over video; not a clinician examination
